title: all about castles
description: this mod adds all kinds of midievel themed stuff while (trying) to keep the vannila feel to the game
body:
# ITS THE ALL ABOUT CASTLES MOD! 
### KEEP IN MIND! this mod is still in beta and so there can be bugs and can still change a lot as new things get added and changed

this is a little mod that adds castle themed stuff to the game!
i try to make this mod fit in with vanilla and every kind of feedback is appreciated!

## so what does this mod add?
- a new kind of bow: long bow!
- a spear!
- new decorations such as the wallpoint blocks!
- the knight armor
- a crown
- watch tower
- Battle axe

## so its in beta whats still to come?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- mostly texure changes to the armor and items
- recipe changes
- castle structeres
- longbow pulling animation
- more building block types
- knight mob


</details>

# FAQ

<details>
<summary>Crafting recipes</summary>

### keep in mind these recipes can change in the future as the mod is still in beta!
  
<details>



<summary>How do i craft the points?</summary>


![point crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed852b9db587e56a48a5311898aee82586b6913.png)


you craft them with just one block in the stone cutter 

table.

</details>


<details>
<summary>How do i craft the wall points?</summary>

![wall with point crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9594eb1e905a264587d05ce3d0b4356777a0c400.png)

you craft them with 3 of the points in a shapless crafting recipe.

</details>


<details>
<summary>how do i craft the LongBow? </summary>

![Longbow recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6597232d8423ee4d0397768373f98a7160d0fd84.png)

you craft a Longbow just like a normal bow but with planks instead of sticks.

</details>



<details>
<summary>how do i craft the knight armor? </summary>

![knight helmet recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30f1e1d8df7872ece56a3e8d61317ce78a44a32c.png)

![knight chestplate recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7689680d76aa2213a5fce46a1a7f7f562c2c6173.png)

![knight leggings recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f03395fa00c0e5eca80f6c7341dac8b09cea36a5.png)

![knight boots recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0f8c31b4bf2b7e5c041c73c564b111ba1aaadaa.png)

you craft the knight armor with chain and one iron.

</details>


<details>
<summary>how do i craft the spear?</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61fb1d875f80c6e9ede1f6065ff0731fb5731927.png)

you craft the spear with 2 sticks and one iron ingot.

</details>


<details>
<summary>How do i craft craft the crown?</summary>
well you dont you find a crown in the watch towers as loot.




</details>


<details>
<summary>How do you craft the battle axe?</summary>

![battle axe crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbbea39ca5249d1ab8b12de6b521a988b0e7bb10.png)

you craft the battle axe with one iron block and 4 iron ingots and 2 sticks

</details>





</details>
